requirements.title: Chat sends query and receives structured AI response
requirements.expected: User types NL query, system parses intent, queries real data, returns structured answer with table/chart
requirements.acceptance: Query submitted -> API called -> structured response rendered in <10s
requirements.notes: Query submits to /api/query, receives structured response

requirements.title: Chat renders data tables inline
requirements.expected: When response contains tabular data, an interactive table component is injected into chat
requirements.acceptance: Table with sort/filter rendered inline in chat response
requirements.notes: Inline data tables rendered in chat

requirements.title: Chat renders charts inline
requirements.expected: When response contains numeric trends, a chart component is injected into chat
requirements.acceptance: Area/bar chart rendered inline in chat response
requirements.notes: Inline charts rendered in chat responses

requirements.title: Multi-turn conversation context
requirements.expected: Follow-up queries reference prior context
requirements.acceptance: Second query correctly uses entity/period from first query
requirements.notes: Conversation history and context sent with each query

requirements.title: Query intent classification routes correctly
requirements.expected: Queries classified as lookup/comparison/report/job and routed appropriately
requirements.acceptance: 5 test queries each classified correctly and routed to right handler
requirements.notes: Intent classified and routed (lookup, comparison, trend, report)

requirements.title: Generate Report produces data-driven narratives
requirements.expected: Click Generate Report -> system queries data for selected entity/period -> generates 6 KPI narratives from actual numbers
requirements.acceptance: Narratives contain correct values for selected entity/period, not hardcoded
requirements.notes: Narratives dynamically computed from financial data

requirements.title: PES entity/period selection changes output data
requirements.expected: Changing entity or period dropdown updates KPI values and narratives
requirements.acceptance: Different entity shows different numbers in KPI cards and narrative text

requirements.title: Sub-unit ranking with Top 3 / Bottom 3
requirements.expected: Each KPI narrative includes ranked sub-units from data
requirements.acceptance: Rankings computed from financial data and match manual sort
requirements.notes: Sub-unit rankings computed from real data

requirements.title: Format variants (Summary/WWW/WNWW) change output
requirements.expected: WWW shows only positive KPIs, WNWW shows only negative KPIs, Summary shows all
requirements.acceptance: Different format selection renders different card set

requirements.title: Interactive KPI table with sort/filter
requirements.expected: KPI data table below narratives supports column sorting and filtering
requirements.acceptance: Click column header sorts data, filter input narrows rows

requirements.title: Budget variance table shows correct calculations
requirements.expected: Table shows Actual vs Replan with variance $ and % correctly computed
requirements.acceptance: Variance = Actual - Replan, Variance% = (Variance/Replan)*100, color coded
requirements.notes: Working correctly with simulated data, filters by entity/period

requirements.title: Peer benchmarking shows live competitor data
requirements.expected: Table shows real financial metrics for all 10 FMCG competitors from FMP API
requirements.acceptance: Revenue, margins, P/E, market cap populated from live API, refresh works

requirements.title: Company drill-down shows detailed financials
requirements.expected: Click competitor row -> detail view with income history, ratios, estimates, ESG, price chart
requirements.acceptance: All 4 detail tabs render with real data from FMP

requirements.title: Margin comparison chart renders
requirements.expected: Margins tab shows horizontal bar chart comparing gross/operating/net margins
requirements.acceptance: Chart renders with correct data for all competitors

requirements.title: Submit Job creates a new job entry
requirements.expected: Submit Job button opens form, user fills fields, job added to queue
requirements.acceptance: New job appears in table with Queued status after submission
requirements.notes: Submit Job opens form and adds to queue

requirements.title: Job status filtering works
requirements.expected: Status tabs (All/Queued/Processing/Completed/Failed) filter the job table
requirements.acceptance: Each tab shows only jobs with matching status

requirements.title: Job table sorting works
requirements.expected: Click column headers to sort jobs
requirements.acceptance: Sort toggles asc/desc/none, handles all data types correctly
requirements.notes: Fully functional with custom ordering for priority/status

requirements.title: Job KPI cards show correct metrics
requirements.expected: Active Jobs count, Avg Processing Time, SLA Compliance %, Agents Online
requirements.acceptance: Metrics computed from job data, not hardcoded

requirements.title: Job row drill-down shows details
requirements.expected: Click job row to see full job details, status history, output
requirements.acceptance: Detail panel/page opens with job metadata and results
requirements.notes: Job row click shows detail panel

requirements.title: Table browser lists all FinSight objects
requirements.expected: Left sidebar shows all 20 Databricks tables/views grouped by category
requirements.acceptance: 20 objects displayed, filterable by search

requirements.title: Column browser shows schema metadata
requirements.expected: Select table -> columns panel shows name, type, description for each column
requirements.acceptance: All columns displayed with correct metadata

requirements.title: Data preview loads and displays
requirements.expected: Select table -> data table shows first 200 rows with correct formatting
requirements.acceptance: Rows render with formatted numbers, sortable columns

requirements.title: Chart visualization of numeric columns
requirements.expected: Click chart icon on numeric column -> area/bar chart renders above data table
requirements.acceptance: Chart shows correct data, togglable between area and bar

requirements.title: Test Connection performs real Databricks test
requirements.expected: Click Test Connection -> system pings Databricks -> shows success/failure with latency
requirements.acceptance: API call made to /api/databricks/test-connection, result displayed
requirements.notes: Test Connection calls real API endpoint

requirements.title: Save button persists connection config
requirements.expected: Click Save -> config written to persistent storage -> survives page reload
requirements.acceptance: Config values persist after reload
requirements.notes: Save button persists config via API

requirements.title: Data mode toggle switches system mode
requirements.expected: Toggle Simulated/Real -> all data endpoints switch source
requirements.acceptance: Toggle updates store, header shows SIM/LIVE badge

requirements.title: KPI cards display with sparklines
requirements.expected: 6 KPI cards with value, change badge, sparkline, status indicator
requirements.acceptance: All 6 cards render with correct data

requirements.title: Revenue chart renders
requirements.expected: Area chart showing revenue trend over 12 months
requirements.acceptance: Chart renders with gradient fill, axes, tooltip

requirements.title: P&L summary table shows GBU data
requirements.expected: Table with 4 GBUs showing Net Revenue, OG%, MAC, CE, NCFO
requirements.acceptance: Data computed from financial data, formatted with colored changes

requirements.title: Sidebar collapses and expands
requirements.expected: Sidebar toggles between 48px and 192px, content area adjusts
requirements.acceptance: Toggle button works, transition is smooth, content reflows

requirements.title: Theme toggle switches dark/light
requirements.expected: Theme toggle in sidebar switches between dark and light mode
requirements.acceptance: All components correctly adapt colors

requirements.title: Market ticker strip scrolls with live data
requirements.expected: Ticker strip shows commodity prices with colored changes, auto-scrolls
requirements.acceptance: Tickers render with correct colors, animation runs

requirements.title: Navigation highlights active page
requirements.expected: Sidebar nav item for current page has active styling
requirements.acceptance: Active page shows bg-sidebar-accent text-sidebar-primary

requirements.title: Suggested queries populate input and execute
requirements.expected: Click suggested query chip -> query appears in input AND auto-submits
requirements.acceptance: Chip click triggers query execution, not just input population

requirements.title: Report caching for fast retrieval
requirements.expected: Second request for same report returns cached result in <1s
requirements.acceptance: Cache hit returns result instantly without regeneration

requirements.title: Data freshness indicator on reports
requirements.expected: All reports show data freshness timestamp
requirements.acceptance: Report header shows 'Data as of Period X, YYYY'
requirements.notes: Data freshness indicator shown on reports

requirements.title: Mode indicator visible in header
requirements.expected: Header shows SIM or LIVE badge based on data mode
requirements.acceptance: Badge color and text update when mode changes

requirements.title: Recent jobs card shows latest jobs
requirements.expected: Dashboard shows 5 most recent jobs with type/status badges
requirements.acceptance: Jobs sorted by creation date, badges colored correctly

requirements.title: Valuation metrics table renders
requirements.expected: Valuation tab shows mkt cap, P/E, EPS, EBITDA%, growth for all competitors
requirements.acceptance: All metrics populated from live FMP data

requirements.title: Column selection filters displayed data
requirements.expected: Toggle column checkboxes to show/hide columns in data table
requirements.acceptance: Only selected columns appear in table

requirements.title: Suggested Prompt Library with 18 curated prompts
requirements.expected: 18 pre-configured prompts displayed in query interface, grouped by category, one-click execution
requirements.acceptance: Prompts fetched from /api/prompts, displayed by category, click resolves variables and submits
requirements.notes: 18-prompt catalog with API and UI integration

requirements.title: Prompt variable resolution engine
requirements.expected: {unit}, {current_year}, {current_period}, {current_quarter} resolved at execution time
requirements.acceptance: Template variables replaced with correct values before query submission

requirements.title: Prompt usage tracking (runs counter)
requirements.expected: Each prompt execution increments a runs counter, displayed in UI
requirements.acceptance: POST /api/prompts increments counter, count shown next to each prompt
requirements.notes: Runs counter tracked and incrementable via API

requirements.title: SWOT Analysis view for competitors
requirements.expected: 2x2 SWOT grid per competitor with strengths/weaknesses/opportunities/threats
requirements.acceptance: SWOT tab renders with Mars hardcoded data and dynamic competitor SWOT

requirements.title: Competitive Positioning Map (scatter chart)
requirements.expected: Interactive 2D scatter: X=revenue growth, Y=operating margin, size=market cap
requirements.acceptance: ScatterChart renders with all competitors positioned correctly

requirements.title: Earnings Call Intelligence view
requirements.expected: Earnings transcript viewer with quarter/year navigation, EPS trend table
requirements.acceptance: Transcripts fetched from /api/fmp/transcripts and displayed

requirements.title: News & M&A Tracker view
requirements.expected: Recent stock news and M&A activity displayed with links and dates
requirements.acceptance: News from /api/fmp/news and M&A from /api/fmp/manda displayed
requirements.notes: News feed and M&A tracker integrated

requirements.title: Additional FMP endpoints (DCF, Insider, News, M&A)
requirements.expected: API routes for DCF valuation, insider trading, stock news, M&A search
requirements.acceptance: All 4 new API routes exist and return FMP data
requirements.notes: All 4 new FMP API routes exist

requirements.title: Competitor universe matches SRS (8+ companies)
requirements.expected: Tracked competitors include NSRGY, MDLZ, HSY, GIS, CL, UL, SJM, KHC, K, PG
requirements.acceptance: COMPETITOR_TICKERS in fmp.ts contains all specified tickers

requirements.title: FMP API endpoints match SRS Table 18 (14+ endpoints)
requirements.expected: All FMP endpoints from SRS are implemented in fmp.ts
requirements.acceptance: Functions exist for profile, income, balance, cash flow, ratios, metrics, transcripts, estimates, news, press, SEC, insider, ESG, M&A, DCF, employee count
